violations.text: The establishment RIDOH Center for Food Protection Food Safety Manger license FMC16094 is expired and must be reinstated. Application printed and supplied to PIC at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, in process of reinstating. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2025
The refrigerator door gasket(s) to the right side 2 door low boy cooler were observed in poor repair. Per the PIC, replacement gasket is on order. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The wall(s) and ceiling in the back prep areas were observed to have an accumulation of dust, soil residue, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The establishment RIDOH Center for Food Protection Food Safety Manger license FMC16094 is expired and must be reinstated. Application printed and supplied to PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The hand sink in the back prep room area was observed not marked/designated as a hand sink and with food debris in it. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. The PIC is properly designate the hand sink for hand washing only. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

At the time of inspection, milk products in the right side 2 door low boy cooler were observed held at 47-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Per the PIC, the milk was recently stocked from colder refrigeration prior to inspection. Milk was moved back to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The following equipment was observed in need of repair/adjustment: - Refrigerator door gasket(s) to the right side 2 door low boy cooler were observed in poor repair. Per the PIC, replacement gasket is on order. - The right side 2 door low boy was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 53 degrees Fahrenheit with milk product inside observed at 47-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is not to be used for storage of Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods until serviced/repaired. - The left side 2 door low boy cooler was observed operating at 45 degrees Fahrenheit with milk product observed at 42-43 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was adjusted to colder setting at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The wall(s) and ceiling in the back prep areas were observed to have an accumulation of dust, soil residue, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, certified food safety manager that is licensed by the RIDOH Center for Food Protection (Owner FSM320869 License expired 1/30/2020). Owner to submit application for renewal of RIDOH Certified Food Safety Manager License. Application printed and left with the owner at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

Cream Cheese held in a metal container with a cold freezer block on the bottom was observed held at 68 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. (Cream Cheese was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection.) Cream Cheese is to be held in refrigeration between uses. Owner to obtain a proper cold hold unit for storage of Time/Temperature Control for Safety food items if intended to be left out for continuous use. (Owner looking into proper cold holding at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following equipment was observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - Prep table shelving - Refrigeration surfaces (internal base area) Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The following areas of the Physical Facilities were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris... - The Ceiling near the air vent in the back prep/storage area was observed to have an accumulation of dust - The Vent Covers in the ceiling were observed to have an accumulation of dust - The Walls/Floor behind and under equipment in the kitchen/prep/storage area was observed to have an accumulation of residue/debris The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The floor in the back prep area is in poor repair (floor covering is cracked/chipped exposing the sub floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
